cards.name: Knight of Swords
cards.interpretation: assertive, direct, impatient, intellectual, daring, focused, perfectionist, ambitious

cards.name: Knight of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: disappointment, tantrums, moodiness, turmoil, avoiding conflict, vanity

cards.name: 2 of Swords
cards.interpretation: stalemate, difficult choices, stuck in the middle, denial, hidden information
